title: Core principle: Silent Bookkeeping — work-language-only chat, bee mechanics never narrated
action: Add the Silent Bookkeeping principle to bee's core doctrine: (1) a Silent Bookkeeping subsection in the Communication Contract of skills/bee-hive/references/routing-and-contracts.md; (2) a new hive-law priority rule + red-flag entry in skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md; (3) a new critical rule + red-flag entry in skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md so every onboarded host project inherits it.

truths: AGENTS.block.md carries the rule so hosts inherit it
red-flag entries added in SKILL.md and AGENTS.block.md
